dialogueChunks.intro: The mediation fell apart, {player_name}. One of the founding family's sons struck a worker during the talks. Now there's a mob forming at {location}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} is trying to hold back the workers from storming the estate, but they're furious. {quest_ally} found evidence that the elite have been stockpiling weapons, anticipating this exact situation. They never intended to negotiate fairly. {quest_item} contains records of how the founding families have been siphoning community funds for years.
dialogueChunks.outro: If you can get {quest_item} to the settlement's neutral council before this turns violent, the evidence might force a real reckoning instead of a bloodbath.

playerResponses.text: Evidence beats violence. I'll get the records to the council.
Maybe the mob has the right idea. The elite won't listen otherwise.
Both sides want blood now. I'm not standing in the middle.

dialogueChunks.intro: The farmers tried to take their harvest back by force. The guards repelled them, but three farmers were injured. The landowner doubled the guard.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} discovered that {quest_item}, the original land charter, specifies that no taxes can be levied without a community vote. The landowner has been violating his own legal authority. But the charter is locked away in {location}, and the landowner's soldiers are between us and the proof.
dialogueChunks.outro: Get the charter to {quest_ally}. If the founding agreement is clear, even the landowner's own guards will have to stand down. The law is on our side if we can put it in front of the right eyes.

playerResponses.text: The truth is in that charter. I'll get it.
What if the landowner destroys it before I get there?

dialogueChunks.intro: The guild masters found out about the investigation. The apprentice who gathered the evidence has been expelled and their workshop was ransacked.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} managed to hide copies of {quest_item} before the guild's enforcers arrived. But the masters are now threatening to blacklist anyone who supports the apprentices. {quest_ally} says three journeymen have already been pressured into withdrawing their testimony. The guild is closing ranks.
dialogueChunks.outro: We need to get the evidence to the trade council in {location} before the guild buries it completely. {quest_item} proves the examinations were rigged for at least a decade. The guild won't stop until they've silenced everyone who knows.

playerResponses.text: Bullies fold when the light hits them. Let's deliver the evidence.
The guild has reach. Are we sure the trade council isn't in their pocket too?
I can't fight an entire guild alone.
